testsuite.name: createPixPayment

testcase.name: deve mapear erro inesperado do client pix gov para status 500
deve propagar CheckoutException do client pix gov
deve usar provider gov quando configurado
deve mapear MPException no fluxo pix mercado pago
deve mapear MPApiException no fluxo pix mercado pago
deve criar pagamento pix com sucesso usando Mercado Pago por padrão

testsuite.system-out: 06:45:17.294 [Test worker] INFO com.marketplace.checkout.service.CheckoutService -- Creating Pix payment with provider=gov for externalRef=ORDER-PIX-1 06:45:17.295 [Test worker] ERROR com.marketplace.checkout.service.CheckoutService -- Pix Gov integration error: connection reset 06:45:17.311 [Test worker] INFO com.marketplace.checkout.service.CheckoutService -- Creating Pix payment with provider=gov for externalRef=ORDER-PIX-1 06:45:17.318 [Test worker] INFO com.marketplace.checkout.service.CheckoutService -- Creating Pix payment with provider=gov for externalRef=ORDER-PIX-1 06:45:17.345 [Test worker] INFO com.marketplace.checkout.service.CheckoutService -- Creating Pix payment with provider=mercadopago for externalRef=ORDER-PIX-1 06:45:17.347 [Test worker] ERROR com.marketplace.checkout.service.CheckoutService -- Mercado Pago Pix SDK error: SDK error 06:45:17.374 [Test worker] INFO com.marketplace.checkout.service.CheckoutService -- Creating Pix payment with provider=mercadopago for externalRef=ORDER-PIX-1 06:45:17.375 [Test worker] ERROR com.marketplace.checkout.service.CheckoutService -- Mercado Pago Pix API error: status=401, message=Unauthorized, details=[Sem corpo de resposta da API.] 06:45:17.383 [Test worker] INFO com.marketplace.checkout.service.CheckoutService -- Creating Pix payment with provider=mercadopago for externalRef=ORDER-PIX-1
